name: Texas-Style Chile Con Queso
recipeIngredient: 1 can Rotel tomatoes with green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the Velveeta and place in a saucepan.
2. Pour in the Rotel tomatoes with green chiles.
3. Stir well to combine.
4. Heat (or nuke) until smooth, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve warm with tortilla chips or Fritos for dipping.
6. Any leftovers will keep in the refrigerator for close to forever and may be reheated as needed as a topping for nachos, spicy cheeseburgers, cauliflower, whatever.
Kathy in Bryan, TX
